description: Created for the woman of sophistication, this sandal from catwalk is crafted with high quality material to offer unparalleled comfort and is uniquely designed to give your feet that urban touche. Heel: 3" Upper Synthetic patent leather upper with a peep toe and a cut out design for enhanced durability and style Buckled back strap and a synthetic leather bow on the toe region for absolute comfort and style Ergonomically curved synthetic leather lined footbed Outsole TPU outsole with a grooved forefoot and heel patch for grip Brand bage on the midfoot region Sandal care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
